title: Mod Compatible Restoration Tanks (Cobblemon)
description: Allows you to use organic materials from various mods to fill the Cobblemon restoration tank when reviving fossils.
body:
# Put more food items into your restoration tanks!
Most vanilla food and organic items can be used to help fill up the restoration tank when reviving fossils in Cobblemon, but for modded items this isn't the case. This data pack adds compatability for a number of mods, allowing you to feed your fossils hamburgers and sushi.

## Made for Cobblemon 1.5.2 (1.20.1)
I haven't tested this datapack with Cobblemon 1.6, so I can't say for sure whether it works or not.

## Supported mods are...
- **Farmer's Delight Refabricated**
- **Cultural Delights**
- **[Let's Do] HerbalBrews**
- **[Let's Do] Vinery** (wine cannot be fed to the restoration tank)
- **Immersive Weathering**
